commands.command: re-review\n\nupdated the pr to remove the append/suffix payload mode. the patch now preserves feishu cardkit full-content updates and reduces long-reply latency by coalescing rapid streaming updates into a bounded cadence. pr body and real behavior proof were updated for head 76d40045e517.

The patch now preserves Feishu CardKit full-content updates and reduces long-reply latency by coalescing rapid streaming updates into a bounded cadence. PR body and real behavior proof were updated for head 76d40045e517.
